docs.title: timyuan.devs
docs.text:
Hey! I'm Tim Yuan. 👋 Welcome to my personal website and portfolio.

I'm a computer science student passionate about AI and web development. 🎓

Currently pursuing my Master's at UIUC, I previously worked as a research intern at UC Irvine on Texera and CellUniverse. 🔬

I'm currently working on an AI supported email client called MailMind. Check this out 🚀
